workflow.name: Boundary & Negative Test Case Generation Workflow
workflow.description: Flow FE-06 gom 3 pipeline doc lap (path mutations, body mutations, LLM suggestions) duoc orchestrate boi BoundaryNegativeTestCaseGenerator. Bat buoc qua FE-05A gate truoc khi bat dau. Tat ca ket qua persist trong 1 transaction.

architectureOverview.summary: Command handler validate va check gate, sau do delegate cho orchestrator service (IBoundaryNegativeTestCaseGenerator). Orchestrator chay 3 pipeline tuan tu, gom ket qua lai, gan OrderIndex. Handler persist toan bo trong 1 transaction, cap nhat suite version, increment subscription usage.
architectureOverview.transactionRequired: Persist toan bo test cases + change logs + suite version trong 1 ExecuteInTransactionAsync.
keyPrinciples: No generation before FE-05A gate pass.
Rule-based mutations are deterministic — cung input thi cung output.
LLM suggestions are non-deterministic nhung duoc cache 24h.
Cross-module boundary via contract/service interface only.
Each pipeline can be toggled independently.
Graceful degradation: LLM audit log failure does not block main flow.

moduleDependencies: ClassifiedAds.Modules.ApiDocumentation (endpoint metadata + parameter details + path mutations)

services: IApiEndpointParameterDetailService.GetParameterDetailsAsync(specId, endpointIds) — fetch parameter details (Location, DataType, Format, IsRequired, DefaultValue, Schema)
IPathParameterMutationGatewayService.GenerateMutations(name, dataType, format, defaultValue) — generate path param mutation variants
ApiDocumentation.forbidden: Khong truy cap ApiDocumentationDbContext/Repository truc tiep.

services: ILlmAssistantGatewayService.CacheSuggestionsAsync(endpointId, suggestionType, cacheKey, json, ttl) — save cache
LlmAssistant.forbidden: Khong truy cap LlmAssistantDbContext/Repository truc tiep.

steps.action: POST /api/test-suites/{suiteId}/test-cases/generate-boundary-negative { specificationId, forceRegenerate?, includePathMutations?, includeBodyMutations?, includeLlmSuggestions? }
Bind request, resolve ICurrentUser.UserId, dispatch GenerateBoundaryNegativeTestCasesCommand.
Validate inputs: TestSuiteId != Empty, SpecificationId != Empty, at least 1 pipeline enabled.
Load TestSuite by ID. Validate ownership (CreatedById == CurrentUserId), status != Archived.
steps.output: Suite loaded or throw NotFoundException(404) / ValidationException(400)

steps.action: RequireApprovedOrderAsync(testSuiteId). Check active proposal with Status in [Approved, ModifiedAndApproved, Applied] and AppliedOrder != null.
steps.output: Ordered endpoints list or throw ConflictException(409, ORDER_CONFIRMATION_REQUIRED)

steps.action: Query existing boundary/negative test cases. If count > 0 and ForceRegenerate=false, throw ValidationException.
CheckLimitAsync(userId, MaxTestCasesPerSuite, endpointCount). If IncludeLlmSuggestions=true, also check MaxLlmCallsPerMonth.
If ForceRegenerate=true and existing cases exist: delete all existing boundary/negative test cases, SaveChanges.
steps.output: Old test cases deleted (or skipped if no existing cases)

steps.action: Fetch endpoint metadata: IApiEndpointMetadataService.GetEndpointMetadataAsync(specificationId, endpointIds).
If IncludePathMutations or IncludeBodyMutations: fetch parameter details via IApiEndpointParameterDetailService.GetParameterDetailsAsync(specificationId, endpointIds).
Iterate ordered endpoints. Per endpoint: (3a) path mutations, (3b) body mutations.

subSteps.name: Path Parameter Mutations Pipeline
subSteps.condition: IncludePathMutations=true AND endpoint has path parameters (Location=Path)
subSteps.action: For each path parameter: call IPathParameterMutationGatewayService.GenerateMutations(name, dataType, format, defaultValue). Build TestCase per mutation via BuildPathMutationTestCase.

subSteps.name: Body Mutations Pipeline
subSteps.action: Build BodyMutationContext from body parameters (Location=Body) and RequestBodySchema. Call IBodyMutationEngine.GenerateMutations(context). Build TestCase per mutation via BuildBodyMutationTestCase.

steps.action: LLM Suggestion Pipeline (IncludeLlmSuggestions=true). Call ILlmScenarioSuggester.SuggestScenariosAsync(context). Build TestCase per scenario via BuildLlmSuggestionTestCase.
Assign sequential OrderIndex (0..N-1) to all test cases. Count endpointsCovered (distinct EndpointId).
steps.output: BoundaryNegativeGenerationResult { TestCases, PathMutationCount, BodyMutationCount, LlmSuggestionCount, EndpointsCovered, LlmModel, LlmTokensUsed }

steps.action: Build cache key: SHA256(testSuiteId:specificationId:sortedEndpointIds) -> hex[0..16].

Check cache per endpoint: for each endpointId, call ILlmAssistantGatewayService.GetCachedSuggestionsAsync(endpointId, SuggestionTypeBoundaryNegative=1, cacheKey). If ALL endpoints have cache -> return cached result (FromCache=true).
Build prompts: Map metadata to EndpointPromptContext via EndpointPromptContextMapper. Build Observation-Confirmation prompts via IObservationConfirmationPromptBuilder.BuildForSequence.

Build N8nBoundaryNegativePayload with: TestSuiteId, TestSuiteName, GlobalBusinessRules, per-endpoint data (EndpointId, HttpMethod, Path, OperationId, OrderIndex, BusinessContext, Prompt, ParameterSchemaPayloads, ResponseSchemaPayloads).
TriggerWebhookAsync<N8nBoundaryNegativePayload, N8nBoundaryNegativeResponse>(webhookName='generate-boundary-negative-scenarios', payload). Record latency via Stopwatch.

Save interaction audit: ILlmAssistantGatewayService.SaveInteractionAsync({ UserId, InteractionType=ScenarioSuggestion(0), InputContext=serialized-payload, LlmResponse=serialized-response, ModelUsed, TokensUsed, LatencyMs }). Graceful failure: log warning if save fails, do not throw.
steps.output: Audit logged (or warning logged on failure)

steps.action: Parse N8nBoundaryNegativeResponse.Scenarios -> List<LlmSuggestedScenario>: map EndpointId, ScenarioName, Description, TestType(boundary|negative), Body, PathParams, QueryParams, Headers, ExpectedStatusCode, ExpectedBehavior, Priority, Tags.

Cache results per endpoint: group scenarios by EndpointId, serialize each group, call ILlmAssistantGatewayService.CacheSuggestionsAsync(endpointId, SuggestionTypeBoundaryNegative=1, cacheKey, json, TTL=24h). Graceful failure: log warning if cache fails.
steps.output: Results cached (or warning logged on failure)

steps.action: If generationResult.TestCases is empty, build empty result model and return immediately (no transaction needed).
steps.output: Early return with TotalGenerated=0 or continue to transaction

steps.action: Execute transaction via _testCaseRepository.UnitOfWork.ExecuteInTransactionAsync:

includes: For each TestCase: AddAsync(testCase), AddAsync(testCase.Request), AddAsync(testCase.Expectation), AddAsync(each variable), AddAsync(each dependency), AddAsync(TestCaseChangeLog { ChangeType=Created })
SaveChangesAsync (1 time at end of transaction)
excludes: LLM audit logging (runs before transaction, in orchestrator)
LLM cache save (runs before transaction, in orchestrator)

steps.action: Increment subscription usage: IncrementUsageAsync(MaxTestCasesPerSuite, totalGenerated). If LLM suggestions used and count > 0: IncrementUsageAsync(MaxLlmCallsPerMonth, 1).
Build GenerateBoundaryNegativeResultModel with all counts, test case summaries, LLM model info. Set on command.Result.
Return HTTP 201 Created with GenerateBoundaryNegativeResultModel body. Location header: /api/test-suites/{suiteId}/test-cases.

testCaseBuilders.description: BoundaryNegativeTestCaseGenerator co 3 builder methods de tao TestCase entities tu moi pipeline.

builders.name: BuildPathMutationTestCase
builders.request: HttpMethod, Url=path, PathParams={paramName: mutation.Value}, BodyType=None, Timeout=30000ms

helperMethods.name: ClassifyPathMutationType
helperMethods.description: Phan loai path mutation thanh Boundary hoac Negative. Boundary: chua 'boundary', 'zero', 'max', 'overflow'. Con lai: Negative.

helperMethods.name: SanitizeName
helperMethods.description: Truncate scenario name to 200 chars. Fallback: '{HttpMethod} {Path} - Boundary/Negative'.

helperMethods.name: ParsePriority
helperMethods.description: Parse string priority (critical|high|medium|low) to TestPriority enum. Default: Medium.

helperMethods.name: ParseHttpMethod
helperMethods.description: Parse string HTTP method to Entities.HttpMethod enum. Default: GET.

helperMethods.name: SerializeTags
helperMethods.description: Serialize tag list to JSON array string. Auto-add: testType tag + 'auto-generated' + source tag.

examples: It nhat mot nguon tao test case phai duoc bat.
Ban khong co quyen thao tac test suite nay.
Khong the generate test cases cho test suite da archived.
Test suite da co N boundary/negative test case(s). Su dung ForceRegenerate=true de tao lai.
Da vuot qua gioi han test case cho goi subscription.
Da vuot qua gioi han LLM calls cho goi subscription.
Khong tim thay test suite voi ma '{TestSuiteId}'.
ORDER_CONFIRMATION_REQUIRED: Chua co API order duoc xac nhan.

gracefulDegradation: LLM interaction audit save failure: log warning, khong throw, tiep tuc flow.
LLM cache save failure: log warning, khong throw, tiep tuc flow.
LLM cache deserialize failure: log warning, treat as cache miss, call LLM fresh.
